2012 residencypublic artinstallation

Local Circumstances (Asia Pacific Fellowship)

Asia Pacific Artist Fellowship, February – June 2012. National Museum of Contemporary Art, Seoul, South Korea

Study for your Portrait

Video-feedback installation. In the otherwise blacked out room, the viewer is illuminated by the flashing scree of the LCD display, which shows the image captured with that light immediately after. LCD display, software, PC, camera.

Mirror Curtain

Metallized Polyester

Saewoon market, Seoul

With Eric Reeder. Photography: Eric Reeder, Boris Oicherman. Metallized Polyester
